sentences.arabic: تُصْبِحُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْمُدُنِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ ذَكِيَّةً وَمُتَطَوِّرَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Mnogi arapski gradovi postaju veoma pametni i razvijeni.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab cities are becoming very smart and advanced.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَاتُ الِابْتِكَارَ الرَّقْمِيَّ لِمُسَاعَدَةِ الشَّبَابِ فِي الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Vlade podržavaju digitalne inovacije kako bi pomogle mladima u poslu.
sentences.translationEn: Governments support digital innovation to help young people with work.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ النَّاسُ التِّقْنِيَّةَ لِتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ فِي الْمُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi koriste tehnologiju da poboljšaju kvalitet života u društvu.
sentences.translationEn: People use technology to improve the quality of life in society.
